creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The update applied with some changes include: 

- Change the shared lib name in the PLIST. 
- Add @dirrm for the enlightenment directory in the PLIST. 
- Regenerate the patch as its first hunk applied with fuzz. 
- Use ${SED} instead of sed in the Makefile. 
- The MAINTAINER line should only contain the e-mail address.
